notes: US-based specialty ingredients company with unique expertise combining sensory texturing and color cosmetic pigments. Sensient Beauty offers a range of texturing agents including natural-origin options for clean beauty formulations, soft-focus powders for premium aesthetics, and specialty pigment-texture combinations for multifunctional cosmetics. Their integrated color and texture expertise makes them a distinctive supplier for brands seeking both performance and aesthetics.
